reasoning: The scroll_teleport design has genuine charm: soft round ring shape, colorful decorative pixels ringing the border, a personality-rich eye/gem center, and flowing blue ribbon elements that read as magical teleportation energy. Dark-bg contrast is solid and the 4x view rewards inspection with character. However, two clear failures: (1) at 1x the silhouette collapses to an undifferentiated circle blob — the scroll-and-portal identity disappears entirely, failing the sticker test for distinctiveness; (2) on the light background the cream outer ring nearly merges with the background, making the silhouette mushy and unreadable. Charm is present but incomplete — the piece is charming-but-mushy on light, not both-charming-AND-clear as required.
